LanguageData.PawnDiary.Command.OpenDiaryDesc: Open or close this pawn's diary.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Tab.NoEntries: No pages have been written yet.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Tab.GenerateForPawn: Write diary pages for this pawn
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Tab.GenerateForPawnTip: When disabled, events are still remembered here, but no new diary page is sent to the writer for this pawn.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Tab.ShowPersonaSettingsTip: Show the manual writing-style picker in this pawn's Diary tab.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Tab.ShowLlmDebugInfoTip: Show raw, pending, and failed entries with endpoint, model, status, error, and prompt diagnostics.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Tab.ShowGeneratingEntriesTip: Reveal pages still being written or stuck on "writing..." so you can see which events never finished. Lighter than the full LLM debug view.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Tab.FillMockEntriesTip: Dev-only: adds {0} completed mock pages across {1} in-game years, about {2} pages per year, so long-history scrolling, year paging, and collapse behavior can be stress-tested without calling an LLM.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Tab.MockEntriesAlreadyFilled: {1}'s diary already has {0} mock test pages.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Tab.PurgeArchivedEntriesTip: Dev-only: removes this pawn's compact archived pages without touching active hot diary pages.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Tab.GeneratePromptSuiteTip: Dev-only: turns on prompt test mode and opens a dropdown of event categories. Pick one to capture a single prompt-only page for that category (plain, no decoration); picking another replaces it. Pair categories need a second colonist.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Tab.ClearPromptSuiteTip: Dev-only: delete every prompt-test entry from all colonists' diaries.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Tab.PromptSuiteEmpty: No prompt test pages were captured for {0}. Enable diary generation for this pawn and try again.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Dev.PromptSuite.Instruction: write a short diary entry for this synthetic dev test event
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Dev.PromptSuite.Insult.Label: Insult
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Dev.PromptSuite.Romance.Label: Married
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Dev.PromptSuite.MentalBreak.Te: {0} snapped and flew into a berserk rage.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Dev.PromptSuite.Arrival.Label: Arrival
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Dev.PromptSuite.Arrival.Text: {0} joined the colony in a synthetic arrival test.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Dev.PromptSuite.Death.Label: Death
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Dev.PromptSuite.Death.Text: {0} died in a synthetic death-description test.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Dev.PromptSuite.Hediff.Label: Fell ill
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Dev.PromptSuite.Work.Label: Research
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Dev.PromptSuite.Thought.Label: Ate without a table
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Dev.PromptSuite.Thought.Text: {0} ate a meal off the ground.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Dev.PromptSuite.MoodEvent.Text: A blistering heat wave settled over the colony.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Dev.PromptSuite.Tale.Label: Finished research
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Dev.PromptSuite.Raid.Label: Raid
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Dev.PromptSuite.Raid.Text: {0} heard the alarm as raiders approached the colony.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Dev.PromptSuite.Quest.Label: Quest accepted
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Dev.PromptSuite.Quest.Text: {0} learned that the colony accepted a synthetic quest.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Dev.PromptSuite.Ritual.Label: Ritual finished
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Dev.PromptSuite.Ritual.Text: {0} stood among the colonists as a synthetic ritual ended.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Dev.PromptSuite.Ability.Label: Ability used
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Dev.PromptSuite.Ability.Text: {0} used a synthetic psycast ability for the diary test.
Today brought focused research, a stinging insult, and a creeping fever.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Dev.PromptSuite.QuadrumReflect: 1st of Aprimay: {0} survived a raid. 6th of Aprimay: fever kept returning. 11th of Aprimay: the colony finished a hard project. 15th of Aprimay: {0} reached a passion milestone.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Dev.PromptSuite.ProgressionSki: {0} reached Construction 12, one of their major passion skills.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Dev.PromptSuite.ProgressionPsy: {0} felt the psylink settle deeper, rising to level 3.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Dev.PromptSuite.ProgressionXen: {0}'s body changed from baseliner to sanguophage.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Dev.PromptSuite.ProgressionRoy: {0}'s title changed from Yeoman to Knight.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Dev.PromptSuite.ArcReflectionF: {0}'s memories from year 5504: - 4 Aprimay: survived a raid that left the workshop burned. - 8 Aprimay: reached Construction 12. - 2 Jugust: gained psylink level 3. - 9 Decembary: became a sanguophage.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Dev.PromptSuite.ArcReflectionM: {0}'s memories from year 5504: - 3 Aprimay: married under torchlight. - 10 Aprimay: lost a friend in a raid. - 4 Jugust: gained psylink level 6. - 7 Decembary: took a new royal title.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Dev.PromptSuite.ArcReflectionC: {0}'s memories from year 5504: - 1 Aprimay: wrote an earlier arc entry. - 6 Aprimay: another major event happened too soon. - 8 Aprimay: the schedule would normally block a second arc.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Dev.EventPanel.Title: Pawn Diary event tests
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Dev.EventPanel.NoGame: Load a map and enable dev mode before opening Pawn Diary event tests.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Dev.EventPanel.NoPawn: No eligible colonist is available for diary event tests.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Dev.EventPanel.NoPartner: Need a second eligible colonist for pair events.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Tab.DevPreviewTip: Dev-only: shows one temporary diary page at the top of the list so text wrapping, markdown, linked cards, writing/title animations, colors, speech blocks, and atmosphere decorations can be checked without saving mock events.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Tab.LinkedTooltip: Click to view {0}'s diary entry for this event
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Tab.YearSelectorTip: Click to choose a diary year.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Tab.ExpandCollapseTip: Click the header to expand or collapse this page.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Tab.CopyEntryTip: Dev-only: copy this page's text to the clipboard. Prompt-only cards copy the captured prompt; other cards copy the generated text.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Tab.RegenerateEntryTip: Rewrite this page with the current model routing. Paired pages regenerate both POVs when available.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Tab.RegenerateEntryUnavailable: This page cannot be regenerated right now.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Tab.ArchivedGenerationFallback: something happened, but the prompt details were not saved
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Error.SkippedIncapacitated: Skipped because the pawn was below {0}% Consciousness when generation would have started.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Error.PromptTestModeCaptured: Prompt test mode captured this prompt without sending it to an LLM.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.ApisHeader: APIs - enabled rows run in parallel (one model each; add more rows for more models)
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.RevealApiKeyTip: Show or hide this API key. Keys stay hidden by default so they are not visible on screen.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.CustomAuthHeaderTip: HTTP header name for the API key, such as x-goog-api-key, api-key, or x-api-key.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.QueryKeyAuthCaution: Sending the key as a URL query parameter can expose it in the API server's request logs. Prefer Bearer token or a custom header when the endpoint supports it.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.ConnectionTestMissing: Connection test needs an endpoint URL.
Connection test needs a model name.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.ConnectionTestPrompt: Reply with one short sentence confirming the API connection works.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.ShowDiaryInspectTab: Show Diary in the pawn inspect tabs
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.ShowDiaryInspectTabTi: Enabled by default. When disabled, Diary moves to a bottom command button on the selected pawn or corpse.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.GenerateTitles: Write short titles for diary pages
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.GenerateTitlesTip: When enabled, each diary entry sends a small follow-up LLM request to write a short title after the main page is written. Adds latency and one extra token bill per entry. When disabled, no new title is written and diary headers show only the date.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.EnableAtmosphericForm: When enabled, only extreme diary pages can use unusual spacing, staggered variable-size words, or dramatic strange-chat speech distortion. Mental breaks, anomaly/dark entries, death descriptions, and pages written while heavily impaired may be affected. Prompts and saved diary text are unchanged.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.EnablePromptEnchantme: When enabled, first-person diary prompts may include one important live context cue. XML controls which health conditions and important-event status cues can appear and how often they win the weighted random pick.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.InjectGeneratedSpeech: Add generated speech to the Social log

When enabled, a completed initiator diary entry with a valid speech block adds one new Social-log line containing that generated spoken text. This can let mods that watch new interaction log entries react after the LLM result is ready.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.PromptTestMode: Prompt test mode: capture prompts only
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.PromptTestModeTip: Dev-only: real gameplay events assemble and save their system and user prompts, but no diary or title request is sent to an LLM. Prompt-only cards appear in the Diary tab while dev mode is on.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.ExportAllDiariesTip: Dev-only: writes every saved pawn diary page and backing event record to a UTF-8 text file under the RimWorld save-data folder. The exported path is copied to the clipboard.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.ExportAllDiariesDone: Exported diary pages to {0}. Path copied to clipboard.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.ExportAllDiariesNoGam: Start or load a game before exporting diary pages.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.TemperatureHelp: Controls model randomness for diary and title requests. Lower values are steadier and more literal; higher values are more varied and atmospheric but can drift from supplied facts.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.TimeoutSecondsHelp: Maximum seconds to wait for one API lane before failing over or marking the request failed. Slow local models may need more than the default 30 seconds.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.MaxTokensHelp: Upper token cap for diary responses before local sentence-aware cleanup. Higher values allow longer pages but slow generation and can make entries less concise.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.GenerationChanceWeigh: Multiplies optional random diary-page chances, including work sampling, social promotion, and ability-use sampling. 1x uses XML tuning defaults; 0x suppresses optional random pages.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.MaxConcurrentHelp: How many requests may be in flight at once on each API; the rest wait in that API's queue. Different APIs always run in parallel, so adding more APIs above speeds up bursts. Use 1 for a single local model that handles one request at a time; raise it only if an endpoint serves requests in parallel.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.PromptStudioHelp: Edit shared system prompts, per-event prompt guidance, and optional event model routing. Use Prompt policy and weights for templates, field lists, prompt cues, and prompt-weight tuning.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.PromptStudioSummary: {0} XML prompt templates and {1} event prompt types loaded; {2} event types customized in settings
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.PromptStudioXmlNote: Field lists, event filters, group instructions, and writing-style catalog defaults are still edited in XML, then applied after restarting RimWorld.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.PersonaStudioHelp: Edit writing-style labels, style rules, and theme tags from DiaryPersonaDefs.xml, or add your own. Tags drive the first-roll weighting for new pawns.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.PersonaStudioTagsHelp: Custom writing styles must keep at least one predefined tag.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.GroupHelp.Dedup: How long before the same event source can record again. 60 ticks is about 1 second; 2500 is about 1 in-game hour.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.GroupHelp.Ability: How ability activations are sampled for diary entries, scaling by cooldown.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.GroupHelp.RitualQ: Maps ritual progress values to compact prompt labels. One row per band: maxExclusive=label.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.GroupHelp.Surroun: How the pawn's immediate area (temperature, notable things) is scanned.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.GroupHelp.Weather: Fallback weather-mention chances for weather not listed explicitly in XML.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.GroupHelp.Health: Thresholds that gate which pain, bleeding, and capacity states are worth recording.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.GroupHelp.Enchant: Severity bands and cue cap for the optional 'important context' prompt line.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.GroupHelp.Conscio: The first-person authorship gate and the handwriting-distortion intensity bands.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.GroupHelp.Buckets: Thresholds that bucket beauty, mood, pain, and opinion into wording.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.GroupHelp.Thought: Magnitude and ambient-collection thresholds for temporary thoughts.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.GroupHelp.Scanner: How often the periodic background scanners run.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.GroupHelp.Work: Sampling chances and cooldowns for work (which has no one-shot event hook).
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.GroupHelp.DayRefl: End-of-day summary master toggle, highlight cap, weights, and gates.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.GroupHelp.Quadrum: Rare long reflection near the end of each quadrum, staggered across colonists.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.GroupHelp.Arc: Rare yearly arc reflections sampled from past diary memories.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.GroupHelp.Misc: Miscellaneous display, UI budget, and age gates.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.GroupHelp.SignalT: Signal policy for temporary ThoughtDef recording. A value of -1 inherits the DiaryTuning default.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.GroupHelp.SignalA: Signal policy for batching low-stakes ambient thoughts into one day note.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.GroupHelp.SignalP: Signal policy for the situational-need scanner (food/rest/outdoors/chemical).
Signal policy for the slow pawn-progression scanner.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.GroupHelp.CtxCond: How active map conditions become prompt and UI context.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.GroupHelp.CtxThre: How the freshest threat letter becomes prompt context.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.GroupHelp.PromptD: Final user instructions and the default writing-style defName. Shared system prompts stay on Shared/event prompts.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.GroupHelp.TmplPai: Prompt template for an ordinary two-pawn interaction. Blank text falls back to the shared defaults.
Prompt template for an important two-pawn moment.
Prompt template for several two-pawn moments folded into one entry.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.GroupHelp.TmplSol: Prompt template for an ordinary first-person solo entry.
Prompt template for an important first-person solo entry.
Prompt template for a solo entry about internal state (no external event).
Prompt template for several solo moments folded into one entry.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.GroupHelp.TmplDay: Prompt template for the end-of-day reflection.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.GroupHelp.TmplQua: Prompt template for the end-of-quadrum reflection.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.GroupHelp.TmplArc: Prompt template for the yearly arc reflection.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.GroupHelp.TmplDea: Prompt template for the neutral death description.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.GroupHelp.TmplArr: Prompt template for the neutral arrival description.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.GroupHelp.TmplTit: Prompt template for generating a short page title.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.socialFightD: Within this window the mirrored social-fight record for the other participant is collapsed.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.mentalBreakD: Same pawn + break is recorded once per this window.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.taleDedupTic: Same TaleDef + pawn is recorded once per this window.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.moodEventDed: Same mood-event GameConditionDef is recorded once per colony per this window.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.thoughtDedup: Same pawn + thought is recorded once per this window.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.romanceDedup: Same romance relation change for a pawn pair is recorded once per this window.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.raidDedupTic: Same raid incident key is recorded once per this window.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.raidGenerati: Ordinary raids wait this many ticks before the LLM request so text can lean into the approach. Drop-pod raids and infestations bypass it.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.questDedupTi: Same quest lifecycle signal is recorded once per this window.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.ritualDedupT: Same ritual outcome is recorded once per this window.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.abilityDedup: Same ability activation is recorded once per this window.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.abilityUseMi: Sampling chance for a no/short-cooldown ability.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.abilityUseMa: Sampling chance a long-cooldown ability approaches.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.abilityUseRe: Cooldown at which the chance curve is roughly halfway between min and max.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.nearbyRadius: Cells searched around the pawn for notable nearby things.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.maxNearbyThi: Cap on nearby candidates considered before the weighted pick.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.coldBelowC: Report 'cold' at or below this temperature (C).
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.hotAboveC: Report 'hot' at or above this temperature (C).
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.weatherChanc: Fallback mention chance for very-bad-favorability weather not listed in XML.
Fallback mention chance for bad-favorability weather.
Fallback mention chance for neutral-favorability weather.
Fallback mention chance for any other weather.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.painVisibleA: Report pain only above this fraction.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.bleedVisible: Report bleeding only above this rate.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.lowCapacityT: Report a capacity only when below this level.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.promptEnchan: Hediff severity at/above which an enchantment reads as 'minor'.
Consciousness below this reads as 'barely conscious'.
Most impact-cue fragments kept in one prompt.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.minimumConsc: Pawns below this Consciousness do not write first-person entries (events still record).
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.staggeredCon: Consciousness below this gives at least intensity-4 handwriting distortion.
Consciousness below this gives at least intensity-3 distortion.
Consciousness below this gives at least intensity-2 distortion.
Consciousness below this gives at least intensity-1 distortion.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.intoxication: Intoxicating-hediff severity at/above this gives intensity-4 distortion.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.beautyPleasa: Plus/minus threshold for the 'notable' beauty gate.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.moodStressed: Mood % at/above this reads as 'stressed' (below is worse).
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.painSevere: Pain fraction at/above this reads as 'severe'.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.painModerate: Pain fraction at/above this reads as 'moderate'.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.opinionNeutr: Opinion above this reads as 'neutral' (else worse).
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.thoughtMinMo: Minimum |mood offset| for a general thought to be recorded.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.thoughtEatin: Minimum |mood offset| for an eating-related thought.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.thoughtAmbie: Ambient temporary thoughts collect until the day changes or this quiet window passes.
Drop ambient notes unless at least this many thoughts accumulated.
Most ambient-thought evidence lines kept in one prompt.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.thoughtProgr: How often the situational-need thought scanner runs.
Same progression signal recorded once per this window.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.hediffProgre: How often the hediff severity-step scanner runs.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.progressionS: How often the slow pawn-progression scanner runs.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.workScanInte: How often the work-sampling scanner runs.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.workBaseChan: Base probability per scan that a working pawn writes about that work.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.workSameType: After a work entry for one WorkTypeDef, suppress that type for this long.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.workRecentDi: Chance multiplier when the pawn had any other work entry inside the cooldown.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.workPassionC: Chance multiplier when the pawn has passion for the work.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.workNegative: Chance multiplier for frustrating or negative work.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.workDarkStud: Chance multiplier for studying in the dark.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.workLowSkill: Best relevant skill below this reads as uncertain or frustrating.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.daySummaryEn: Master toggle for end-of-day summaries (off = old per-source ambient notes).
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.daySummaryMa: Most highlights woven into one day reflection.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.daySummaryOp: Opinion swing (vs day-start) that becomes a social-dynamic signal.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.daySummaryWe: Relative selection weight for combat / mental-state day events.
Relative selection weight for other important day events.
Relative selection weight for a hediff signal.
Relative selection weight for an opinion swing (scaled by magnitude).
Relative selection weight for background small talk.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.quadrumRefle: Master toggle for the rare end-of-quadrum reflection.
Final days of a quadrum that can host long reflections (staggers colonists).
Minimum important entries before the quadrum reflection may write.
Prompt evidence cap for the quadrum reflection.
Per-request output cap for the quadrum reflection.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.arcReflectio: Master toggle for rare yearly arc reflections.
Allow a second arc entry in a year after a major moment.
Most arc reflections one pawn writes per year.
Minimum gap (days) between two arc entries in the same year.
0..100 severity a progression trigger must reach to count as major.
Force a yearly arc on/after this year-day if one hasn't happened.
Retry delay after a forced arc found too few memories.
Preferred minimum memories before writing (it waits if short).
Hard minimum memories for a forced arc.
Most memories sampled for one arc.
Memories remembered as recently used, to avoid repeats.
Max length of each memory snippet in the prompt.
Per-request output cap for arc reflections.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.diaryLineMax: Truncate the 'last wrote' continuity line to this many characters.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.activeScanEv: Newest colony-wide diary events kept 'hot' for background scans and prompt continuity.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.archivedFall: Word count of the date-line fallback title for never-generated archived entries.
Max length of the prompt-fact fallback body for archived entries.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.uiHistorySca: Max events the Diary UI may index in one frame.
Wall-clock budget per frame for sliced Diary UI history indexing.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.minimumFirst: Minimum biological age for first-person diary ownership.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.humorChance: Base probability an eligible entry gets one structural humor cue.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.dedupTicks: Same signal for this source is recorded once per this window. Use -1 to inherit the DiaryTuning default.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.minMoodOffse: Minimum |mood offset| for a general thought to record here. Use -1 to inherit.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.eatingMinMoo: Minimum |mood offset| for an eating thought. Use -1 to inherit.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.ambientWindo: Ambient thoughts collect until this quiet window passes.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.ambientMinEv: Drop ambient notes unless at least this many accumulated.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.scanInterval: How often this scanner runs. Use -1 to inherit.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.baseChance: Base probability per scan that a working pawn writes. Use -1 to inherit.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.sameTypeCool: Suppress the same work type for this long after one entry.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.recentDiffer: Chance multiplier for a different work type inside the cooldown.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.passionChanc: Chance multiplier when the pawn has passion for the work.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.negativeChan: Chance multiplier for frustrating or negative work.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.darkStudyCha: Chance multiplier for studying in the dark.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.lowSkillThre: Best relevant skill below this reads as uncertain.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.maxItems: Most items this context reaction contributes to the prompt.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.displayOnUiO: Show this context on the Diary UI only, without adding it to prompts.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.scanBack: How many recent letters/entries to scan back.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.timeoutTicks: After this many ticks the tracked signal is considered stale.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.requireHomeM: Only track this signal on the player's home map.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.requireDange: Only track this signal while a danger threat is active.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.systemPrompt: System prompt for this prompt shape. Leave blank to fall back to the shared system prompt.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.finalInstruc: Final user-message instruction for this shape. Leave blank to use the shared default.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Settings.Adv.Help.recipientFin: Follow-up instruction for the recipient's reply in pair shapes. Leave blank for the shared default.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Event.SocialFight: {0} and {1} lost their tempers and came to blows.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Event.BatchInstruction: write one diary entry for the overall {0} exchange, not separate entries for each listed moment
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Event.TaleBatchInstruction: write one solo diary entry for the overall {0} stretch, not separate entries for each listed moment
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Event.CombatBatchBrief: A dangerous combat moment left a mark.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Event.CombatBatchFallback: {0} lived through a hard stretch of combat.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Event.CombatBatchInstruction: write one solo diary entry about the overall fight, using the listed combat log lines as factual evidence; do not report each wound, downing, or kill separately
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Event.InsultBatchInstruction: write one diary entry for the overall conflict, using the listed game log lines as factual evidence; do not report each insult separately
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Event.AmbientDayFallback: {0} had a few quiet {1} moments today.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Event.AmbientDayInstruction: write one natural diary paragraph about the background texture of the day; do not summarize it as a log, do not list every moment, do not mention counts, and use names only when they feel emotionally relevant
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Event.AmbientSocialHeader: Passing social moments colored the day:
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Event.AmbientSocialFallback: {0} drifted through a few small social moments today.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Event.AmbientSocialInstruction: write one natural diary paragraph about the social atmosphere of the day; treat the listed conversations as background evidence, not events to report; do not list names or counts unless a name carries emotional weight
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Event.AmbientStrangeChatFallba: {0} carried the aftertaste of strange conversations today.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Event.AmbientStrangeChatInstru: write one natural diary paragraph about the unease these strange conversations left behind; treat the listed chats as background evidence, not separate reports; keep the wrongness unresolved
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Event.AmbientAnimalFallback: {0} spent part of the day around the colony's animals.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Event.AmbientAnimalInstruction: write one natural diary paragraph about the feel of working around animals today; do not turn the moments into a training log, and only name animals or handlers if it feels personal
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Event.AmbientTeachingHeader: Teaching and learning moments colored the day:
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Event.AmbientTeachingFallback: {0} spent part of the day around teaching and learning.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Event.AmbientTeachingInstructi: write one natural diary paragraph about the feeling of teaching or learning today; avoid lesson-by-lesson reporting and focus on the relationship or mood it left behind
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Event.AmbientThoughtHeader: Small feelings and impressions colored the day:
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Event.AmbientThoughtFallback: {0} carried a few passing feelings through the day.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Event.AmbientThoughtInstructio: write one natural diary paragraph about the emotional texture these passing feelings left behind; do not list each thought, do not mention counts, and only name the source of a feeling if it would matter to the pawn
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Prompt.PairDirectSpeechInstruc: Initiator POV for {0}: when the notes contain, report, or strongly imply spoken words from {0}, include exactly one short line on its own as [[speech]]...[[/speech]]. Put only {0}'s spoken words inside; no narration. Example: I told {1} to stop. [[speech]]Enough.[[/speech]] Wrong: tagging {1}'s reply, tagging thoughts, or inventing speech. If {0} did not speak, use no speech block and write {0}'s private reaction instead.

Recipient POV for {0}: do not use [[speech]] blocks in this second-perspective entry. Paraphrase any spoken words as {0}'s private reaction to {1}; do not quote {1}, do not tag thoughts as speech, and do not invent words for {0} to say.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Prompt.SoloInteractionDirectSp: Single-POV interaction for {0}: when the notes contain, report, or strongly imply spoken words from {0}, include exactly one short line on its own as [[speech]]...[[/speech]]. Put only {0}'s spoken words inside; no narration. Example: I muttered under my breath. [[speech]]Not again.[[/speech]] Wrong: tagging another pawn, tagging thoughts, or inventing speech. If {0} did not speak, use no speech block and write {0}'s private reaction instead.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Event.DayReflectionHeader: Of everything today, these stayed with {0}:
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Event.DayReflectionFallback: {0} settled down at the end of a quiet, unremarkable day.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Event.DayReflectionInstruction: write one short reflective diary paragraph as {0} settling down at day's end, looking back on the day as a whole; weave together only the moments below that would still be on their mind, using their writing style; these are the highlights they already lived, so reflect on how the day felt rather than re-reporting each event; do not write a list or mention counts
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Event.DayReflectionFillerLine: the ordinary background of small talk and passing moods
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Event.QuadrumReflectionInstruc: write one longer reflective diary entry as {0} looking back across {1}; mention dates naturally from the supplied highlights; connect the events into what this stretch of life has meant instead of listing them; use only supplied facts and the pawn's writing style
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Event.StartingArrival: {0} was one of the colony's founding colonists.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Event.RitualFinished: {0} finished the ritual {1} as {2}; ritual role: {3}.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Ritual.Role.Author: author
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Event.RitualInstruction.Author: write as the ritual's author/organizer after it has finished; carry responsibility, public pressure, and what the completed ceremony cost or proved
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Event.RitualInstruction.Target: write as the ritual's target after it has finished; center what it meant to be singled out, watched, changed, judged, honored, or used by the ceremony
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Event.RitualInstruction.Partic: write as a ritual participant after it has finished; use the assigned role and ritual title as concrete pressure, not background decoration
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Event.RitualInstruction.Specta: write as a spectator after the ritual has finished; focus on watching, judging, belonging, doubt, awe, discomfort, or relief from the edge of the ceremony
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Event.PsychicRitualInstruction: write as the psychic ritual's invoker after it has completed; make the atmosphere unsettling, scary, dark, or plain incomprehensible; include exactly one short standalone [[speech]]...[[/speech]] block containing invented, broken, or half-understood ritual words from the invoker, and put no narration inside that block
write as the psychic ritual's target after it has completed; make the event frightening, violating, or darkly numbing without explaining the occult mechanism
write as someone involved in the psychic ritual after it has completed; keep the atmosphere unsettling, scary, and hard to fully understand
write as someone who watched the psychic ritual complete; focus on dread, wrongness, fear, silence, strange sound, or relief from the edge of it
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Dev.MockBody: Mock diary page {0}. {1} carried this deliberately artificial memory through the day so the diary can be tested with a long, multi-year history.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Dev.PreviewLinkedText: The other perspective preview should sit inside the main card, with its own border, accent strip, label line, and clipped body text.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Dev.PreviewBodyPlain:
This is a simulated diary page for {0}. It includes **bold memory**, *uneasy emphasis*, and "quoted words" inside ordinary prose.
The second paragraph is deliberately longer so wrapping, spacing, and the page bottom can be checked without waiting for an LLM.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Dev.PreviewBodyMarkdown: # A heading-like line - A bullet marker should become a compact bullet. > A quote marker should disappear while the words remain. This line checks **bold**, *italic*, and "inline spoken words" in the ordinary body renderer.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Dev.PreviewBodySpeech: {0} writes a short ordinary line before saying something out loud. [[speech]]This line should become the colored speech block.[[/speech]] After the speech, ordinary narration should return to the diary body style.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Dev.PreviewBodyStaggered: {0} tries to keep the page steady after too much drink. [[speech]]I can write this straight. The room keeps tilting, the letters keep slipping, and I am almost sure nobody can tell.[[/speech]] Only the spoken block should pick up the configured staggered word-size decoration.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Dev.PreviewBodyCombat:
{0} is testing the combat diary color and a longer, harsher entry shape. The page should carry the combat accent while ordinary narration still wraps cleanly around strong verbs, clipped sentences, and **important** damage details.
A second combat paragraph checks that the card keeps enough bottom padding after a dense account of smoke, blood, shouted orders, and the sick quiet that follows a fight.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Dev.PreviewBodySocialFight: {0} is testing the social-fight accent, where the page should feel angry without using the full combat color. Short lines should still stay readable. The card should show the orange conflict cue, ordinary body text, and enough space after the last sentence.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Dev.PreviewBodyMental:
{0} is testing the fractured mental-break layout. One thought holds still. Another snaps sideways. The room answers anyway. Hands shake. The margin keeps moving.
The second paragraph checks that fractured spacing still respects blank-line gaps while short broken sentences scatter across the page.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Dev.PreviewBodyDark: {0} is testing the extreme-dark cue and unsettled layout. The page should lean into the dark red accent without losing legibility. [[speech]]Something moved where there was no light.[[/speech]] The spoken line should dim selected words instead of using the strange-chat glyph distortion.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Dev.PreviewBodyStrange: {0} records the moment as carefully as possible, but the lines do not want to stay where they belong. [[speech]]The walls answered before I spoke.[[/speech]] The strange preview keeps the unsettled layout and the color cue that drives Zalgo-style direct-speech distortion.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Dev.PreviewBodyDeath:
{0}'s death-preview page should settle into the centered memorial layout. The words are not a real eulogy; they are only here to check the pale accent, spacing, and quiet line breaks.
What remains is a measured silence, a name held carefully, and enough text to prove the memorial card can breathe without clipping.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Dev.PreviewBodyLinked:
{0} is testing the main side of a pairwise diary card. The linked preview above or below should reserve height correctly, stay inside its border, and keep the main text from clipping.
This page also checks that the linked card and body text use separate colors and spacing.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Dev.PreviewBodyWriting: {0} is testing the in-progress writing placeholder. This body is stored as raw preview data, but the card should show the animated writing dots instead of finished prose while the status is pending.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Dev.PreviewBodyTitle: {0} is testing the title-pending header. The body is complete, but the header should keep the date visible and animate small dots where the generated title will appear.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Event.ThoughtProgressionInstru: this is a worsening stage of an ongoing need or situation; write about the current severity, do not treat it as a brand-new unrelated thought, and do not repeat earlier stages
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Event.WorkDarkStudy: {0} studied what should not be studied: {1}.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Event.EventWindow.Generic.time: {0} kept waiting for an answer about {1}, but none came.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Event.EventWindow.Generic.Inst: write this as an ongoing event window about {0}; use only supplied facts and keep the pawn's uncertainty clear
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Event.EventWindow.VoidMonolith: {0} completed an interaction with the void monolith: {1}.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Event.ObservedCondition.Generi: write this as an ongoing observed condition about {0}; use only the supplied observable facts and keep the pawn's uncertainty clear
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Event.ObservedCondition.Anomal: {0} found gray flesh in the colony: {1}.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Error.SkippedInitiatorFailed: Skipped because the initiator diary page failed to write.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Error.NoApiConfigured: No API is configured. Add an endpoint and model in the mod settings.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Error.TitleEmptyResponse: Title follow-up returned no usable text.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Prompt.PersonaVoice: How this pawn tends to write: {0} Follow the rule's concrete sentence shape, opening move, punctuation, and detail choice. Do not roleplay a chat persona, add catchphrases, or invent dialogue.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Prompt.HumorVoice: For this one entry, an extra license is granted: {0} Keep it to a single sentence and do not break the writing style above. Never force a joke, add a punchline, or invent comic dialogue.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Prompt.Health.Description.Alco: alcohol lifts mood while loosening judgment, slowing movement, and clouding awareness as it deepens
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Prompt.Health.Description.Hang: the delayed aftereffect of alcohol leaves the head pounding and consciousness dulled
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Prompt.Health.Description.Ambr: ambrosia brings a gentle warmth, relaxed mood, and a little easy energy
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Prompt.Health.Description.GoJu: go-juice drives a pumped but steady combat rush, dulling pain and pushing the body faster
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Prompt.Health.Description.Luci: luciferium mechanites sharpen the whole body while leaving an unspoken debt for the next dose
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Prompt.Health.Description.Flak: flake gives a powerful euphoric psychite rush that feels bright but physically debilitating
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Prompt.Health.Description.Psyc: psychite tea gives a milder euphoric lift, easing pain and adding comfortable energy
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Prompt.Health.Description.Yayo: yayo hits as intense psychite euphoria with restless confidence and a faster body
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Prompt.Health.Description.Smok: smokeleaf wraps thought in fuzzy well-being while slowing awareness and movement
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Prompt.Health.Description.Reve: a revenant's psychic hold keeps dragging attention into trance and blank obedience
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Prompt.Health.Description.Cube: the cube keeps returning to mind until ordinary thoughts feel secondary
separation from the cube becomes an aching need that crowds out other concerns
the cube fixation has curdled into violent, narrowing anger
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Prompt.Health.Description.Corp: death-haunted torment presses into thought and will not settle like ordinary grief
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Prompt.Health.Description.Inhu: human warmth and ordinary attachment have gone distant; the pawn's thoughts should feel cold, void-touched, and detached from people without inventing new lore
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Prompt.Health.Cue.DarkVoidVoic: use the forced dark void writing style
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Prompt.Context.Cue.RespectIfRe: respect this status if it changes how the pawn would frame the event
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Event.EventWindow.AncientDange: Near an ancient wall, {0} felt sudden foreboding: {1}.
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Prompt.ObservedCondition.MapTh: keep an undercurrent of danger from the ongoing threat
an active threat on the colony's map
the map is still dangerous right now; even an ordinary moment is shadowed by the awareness that the colony is not safe yet
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Prompt.ObservedCondition.Toxic: let the toxic fallout press on daily life
toxic fallout is still falling; going outside means sickness, so the colony stays shut in and uneasy
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Prompt.ObservedCondition.Solar: let the solar flare's loss of power color the day
a solar flare knocking out power
a solar flare has cut electrical power; everything electronic is dead until it passes, forcing the colony back to the basics
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Prompt.ObservedCondition.Anoma: override normal context with unresolved unease about the gray flesh
gray flesh still in the colony
gray flesh the pawn can actually see is still present in the colony and no one knows what it means; ordinary moments are quietly shadowed by that unease, without naming any hidden mechanic
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Prompt.ObservedCondition.Metal: override normal context with the revealed metalhorror threat
a metalhorror that has revealed itself
the hidden thing has finally shown itself and the danger is now open and immediate; write only what the pawn can see of the revealed threat
LanguageData.PawnDiary.Event.ArcReflectionInstruction: a rare private life-arc reflection for {0} in year {1}; connect selected memories into who they are becoming
